non_blocking_findings.title: Underlying API corruption still present
non_blocking_findings.details: The UI now degrades safely, but the local API/database still returns corrupted holdings, alerts, and some news payloads.

missing_tests: cd frontend && npx playwright test e2e/smoke.spec.ts --config=e2e/playwright.config.ts
commands_reviewed: cd frontend && npm run test -- --run components/dashboard/news-panel.test.tsx components/dashboard/top-holdings-table.test.tsx components/watchlist/alert-settings-card.test.tsx components/watchlist/popular-top5.test.tsx lib/market/display.test.ts
evidence: Portfolio page now degrades to an empty-safe state instead of rendering corrupted holdings.
Dashboard now shows a corrupted-data banner and market-leaders fallback instead of broken holdings/news.
Watchlist alert settings now labels corrupted records as recovery rows with delete-only actions.
next_actions: Repair the local corrupted source data if a realistic demo dataset is required.
